report_name: Culture of Secrecy: 55% of Security Pros Told to Hide Breaches, Bitdefender Report Finds

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Unauthorized access to cloud infrastructure was reported as the most common incident type (41.8%) by professionals surveyed by Bitdefender.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Business email compromise (BEC) was reported as a common incident type (35.9%) by professionals surveyed by Bitdefender.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Ransomware was reported as a common incident type (25.6%) by professionals surveyed by Bitdefender.

identities.name: IT and Security Professionals in Organizations with over 500 employees
identities.description: A class of professionals from mid-to-large enterprises surveyed by Bitdefender, 55.2% of whom were instructed to conceal a security breach. The survey covered various industries.
